content.text: I’ll inspect the embeddable metadata, hydration, and change-set code paths plus existing nested embeddable tests to locate where column names are generated when embedded values are null.
I found the embeddable-related source and tests; next I’m narrowing this to the code path that flattens embedded values into database column names.

I found the likely areas: metadata discovery (where embedded field names are initialized) and `EntityComparator` snapshot generation (where null embeddables are flattened into payload columns). I’ll inspect the embedded metadata setup and snapshot property generation next.

content.text: I found the likely issue in the snapshot generation path for inline embeddables: when a nullable parent embeddable is `null`, the null-handling branch only sets direct embedded children to null, which is wrong for nested inline embeddables because it can emit the intermediate embeddable property name instead of the leaf column names.

content.content:
M packages/core/src/utils/EntityComparator.ts
 packages/core/src/utils/EntityComparator.ts | 13 +++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 13 insertions(+)

content.text:
Implemented the fix for inline nested embeddables when the parent embeddable is `null`.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/core/src/utils/EntityComparator.ts`
- When snapshotting a `null` inline embeddable parent, nested inline embeddable children are now expanded to their actual flattened column/property names instead of generating an intermediate wrong key like `parent_child`.
- This prevents inserts/updates from targeting a non-existent column and correctly sets columns such as `parent_child_value` to `null`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the failure.
- Confirmed the test failed before the fix with:
  - `table nested_user has no column named parent_child`
- Applied the fix.
- Confirmed the temporary regression test passed.
- Restored/deleted the temporary test changes as requested.
- Re-ran the existing affected test file:
  - `yarn test GH7023.test.ts`
  - Passed.

Final working tree:
- Only source fix remains:
  - `packages/core/src/utils/EntityComparator.ts`

No commits were created.

result:
Implemented the fix for inline nested embeddables when the parent embeddable is `null`.

What changed:
- Updated `packages/core/src/utils/EntityComparator.ts`
- When snapshotting a `null` inline embeddable parent, nested inline embeddable children are now expanded to their actual flattened column/property names instead of generating an intermediate wrong key like `parent_child`.
- This prevents inserts/updates from targeting a non-existent column and correctly sets columns such as `parent_child_value` to `null`.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the failure.
- Confirmed the test failed before the fix with:
  - `table nested_user has no column named parent_child`
- Applied the fix.
- Confirmed the temporary regression test passed.
- Restored/deleted the temporary test changes as requested.
- Re-ran the existing affected test file:
  - `yarn test GH7023.test.ts`
  - Passed.

Final working tree:
- Only source fix remains:
  - `packages/core/src/utils/EntityComparator.ts`

No commits were created.
